title: Conferences/Workshop/Training programs/Webinars/Seminars
content: Conferences/Workshop/Training programs/Webinars/Seminars JUIT Showcases Sustainable Innovations at World Environment Day Exhibition 2026, Shimla: 5 June 2026 Visit of Prof. Rajesh Sani to Biogas Plant, JUIT: September 17, 2025 Report of Visit of Dr. Ashish Sharma (Alumni of ECE): 05-05-2025 Report on Visit to Biogas Plant at Government Primary School Denoda Village, near Jaypee University Campus: 13th Jan, 2025 An International Conference on Recent Developments on Interfaces of Chemistry, Biology and Material Sciences towards Health and Environment: 8th -10th October 2024 Visit of Wisdom Convent School Fazilka, Punjab: 05th June 2024 The Principals visit at CESTRD on 13th April 2024 Scientifical Advancement of Moveable Biogas Digester Chir Coal – A Sustainable Lifestyle Goal: On the World Environment Day – 05 June, 2023 Pine Briquettes Technology at G20 Event: March 15 - March 17, 2023 Visit of General Shivdev Singh Diwan Gurbachan Singh Khalsa College, Patiala Students to Biogas Facility of Juit on 31st October, 2022 and 1st November 2022. School, Delgi, Solan - 06 July, 2022 Invited talk on "Skill Development of Science Students" in Uttrakhand Science Congress at Graphic Era University, organized by Uttrakhand Council of Science and Technology, Dehradun on 15-16 June, 2022. Plenary lecture on Biogas in a National Conference on Current Scientific Innovations & Research in Plant Biology (May 27, 2022) at Eternal University, Baru Sahib, Sirmour, HP. International Conference on Renewable Energy for Sustainable Environment ( November 23- 24, 2021) Theme: The focus of the conference is on sustainable technologies in the area of renewable energy like Solar energy, Hydro-wind energy, Biofuels production, Electronic and computer energy saving devices, and economic activities such as approach to market and government bodies for financial assistance especially for upliftment of rural people. -Flyer - Schedule - News Clipping - Abstract Book Bioenergy from food waste: Invited Lecture by Prof. Sudhir Kumar for MCM DAV College for Women, Chandigarh. 06 Feb. 2021.
